title: Lurking Entities
description: Eerie white eyed animals which stalk you from above, below and around you.
body:
This mod adds white eyed, herobrine looking animals (cows, pigs, sheep, chickens) with white eyes, which spawn during the night and a small chance during the day, and especially more common spawning in caves, and tunnels underground. When an animal spawns often a cave noise (or a slowed cave noise) will be played, but somtimes does not play the noise. You can use the /summon [stalker] to summon a certain type of animal with cheats enabled. The entities can stalk you, and watch you from outside your window until you make eye contact of which they will run at you and can break into your house!

Amongst ordinary mobs and animals, this mod adds eerie white eyed entities which look like friends, but might be foes. The animals silently stalk you from both nearby and at distance blending into the shadows, all you can see is their white, herobrine like eyes.

Can you survive the night?
